blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,440 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
